title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at FIITJEE - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at FIITJEE - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the FIITJEE family as a Curriculum Developer in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FIITJEE:
FIITJEE is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE!
